targets.name: Judd Orthodontics
targets.routeProof: `Contact | Judd Orthodontics, Mesa, AZ` page live at `https://www.juddorthodontics.com/contact/`
targets.primaryNote: Hi Dr. Judd — saw Judd pushes Request an Appointment plus Dental Monitoring and LightForce. Quick idea: missed calls and after-hours consult requests can get a fast text-back so fewer starts go cold. Short ortho example here: [proof-page-link]. If useful, happy to map one around your current appointment flow.
targets.linkSafeFallback: Hi Dr. Judd — saw Judd pushes Request an Appointment plus Dental Monitoring and LightForce. Quick idea: missed calls and after-hours consult requests can get a fast text-back so fewer starts go cold. If useful, I can send over a short ortho example built around that flow.
targets.ultraShortFallback: Hi Dr. Judd — quick idea: missed ortho consult calls can get an immediate text-back so fewer starts go cold. If useful, I can send a short example.
